schema_notes: row-level expected values with accepted variants; content-level expected lists for decisions / action_items / open_questions

ordered_anchor_phrases.canonical: pagination refactor for the admin dashboard
pull request is now in staging
need access to the staging logs

decisions.explanation: Audio is a single-speaker status update with no consensus moments; an empty array is the correct answer here. Items here must be supported by SRT-verifiable evidence.

action_items.explanation: The speaker mentions investigating the notification service latency bug today (≥1 action item). At least one item with quoted evidence supportable from the SRT is required.

open_questions.explanation: There's at least one unresolved item flagged (e.g. needing access to staging logs).

ground_truth.expected_decisions_note: The standup is a single-speaker status update — no consensus / decision points are recorded in the audio. The correct value here is an empty array.

expected_action_items.task_canonical: investigate the notification service latency bug
task_accepted: look at the notification service latency
look into the notification service latency

expected_open_questions.question_canonical: need access to the staging logs to confirm the missing database index
question_accepted: needs access to the staging logs
missing index needs to be confirmed
unclear which index is missing without staging logs
need to confirm the missing database index
expected_open_questions.evidence_anchor_canonical: need access to the staging logs

content_match_policy.explanation: For each expected_action_items[i] entry, the executor's standup_struct.json must contain ≥1 action_items entry whose `owner` matches owner_canonical or any owner_accepted variant (case-insensitive substring), AND whose `what` field matches task_canonical or any task_accepted variant (case-insensitive substring), AND whose `source_evidence_quote` contains evidence_anchor_canonical or any evidence_anchor_accepted variant (case-insensitive substring). Same shape applies to expected_open_questions[i]. Deadline is matched only if non-null in GT — null in GT means deadline_or_null may be null or any matching string variant. expected_decisions is empty so the executor's decisions array MUST be empty (or contain only items whose source_evidence_quote is independently verifiable in the SRT cue text).
